creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad The cutest shop in London! 🐻‍❄️ This is @ruarua_panda, where you’ll find all things Panda! A shop entirely dedicated to the cutest panda items and you’ll even find the UK’s only panda photo booth in here which is a MUST!! Share this with someone who would love to visit!

📍23 St Christopher’s Pl, London W1U 1NR
👩‍💻 You can also visit their online store at bamboozoo.uk and they ship across the UK and Europe

transcription.text: Right opposite Bond Street Station you might completely miss this purple clock. It's pointing towards St Christopher's Place where apparently you'll find a shop entirely dedicated to pandas. So of course we had to go and find it and here it is. This is Rua Rua Panda where you'll genuinely find all things panda. Here you can personalise your own wallet or mini toe with a huge range of the cutest stick-ons. They have every possible panda plushie you can imagine including a wool collection and baby pandas that actually weigh the exact same weight a real baby panda would weigh and they even have the UK's only panda photo booth hidden at the back. They have lots of props that you can pick from and the frames are adorable. Guys this has to be one of the cutest shops we've visited. Definitely check it out and find all the details in the caption.
